response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in software development, particularly with JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and some Java, but lacks direct experience in IDE tooling, JVM internals, or enterprise Java/Kotlin frameworks like Spring. His roles have focused on web/mobile applications and backend services rather than language tooling or IDE development. While his engineering skills are solid, the gap in core IDE/JVM expertise is a significant concern.
strengths: Strong general software engineering skills with experience in multiple languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, D, C++)
Proven track record in building scalable systems and contributing to open-source projects
Demonstrated ability to learn new technologies quickly and adapt to different domains
concerns: No direct experience with IDE development, JVM tooling, or enterprise Java/Kotlin frameworks (Spring, Quarkus, etc.)
Primary expertise in web/mobile development rather than language tooling or developer tools
Limited evidence of working on large-scale developer tools or application server integrations
